member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.App
member.summary: Application bootstrapper with full enterprise hardening: - DI container initialization - Database migration + seeding - State recovery (persisted + validated) - Monitor/watchdog startup - 5-second graceful shutdown with forced termination fallback
App

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.App.InitializeComponent
member.summary: InitializeComponent

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.App.Main
member.summary: Application Entry Point.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Commands.BaseAsyncCommand
member.summary: Base asynchronous command integrating with loading spinner and exceptions tracing.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Commands.DelegateAsyncCommand
member.summary: Delegate implementation of BaseAsyncCommand for passing async methods.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Commands.BaseCommand
member.summary: Base synchronous command providing claim checks and pre-execution hooks.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Commands.DelegateCommand
member.summary: Delegate implementation of BaseCommand for passing action methods.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.DependencyInjection
member.summary: Dependency Injection registration for the WPF presentation layer. Registers all views, view models, UI services, and infrastructure monitors.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.DependencyInjection.AddPresentation(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers WPF view models, views, UI services, and hardening infrastructure into the DI container.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Helpers.SecurityAction
member.summary: Defines the restriction actions to apply when a user lacks UI permissions.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Helpers.SecurityAction.Hide
member.summary: Hide the visual control entirely (Visibility = Collapsed).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Helpers.SecurityAction.Disable
member.summary: Disable interaction with the control (IsEnabled = False).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Helpers.Security
member.summary: WPF attached dependency properties for UI-level permission validation.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Helpers.Security.RequiredPermissionProperty
member.summary: Attached property to specify the required permission code for a UI element.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Helpers.Security.RestrictionActionProperty
member.summary: Attached property to specify the restriction action (Hide/Disable) when permission fails.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Helpers.Security.ApplySecurity(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: Evaluates the claim checks of ICurrentUserService on the given UI element.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.EventSubscriptionTracker
member.summary: Tracks event subscriptions for a ViewModel instance and detaches all handlers deterministically when the ViewModel is disposed, preventing event-handler memory leaks.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.EventSubscriptionTracker.Track(System.Action,System.Action)
member.summary: Registers an event subscription with its corresponding detach action.
member.param: Action that adds the handler to the event source.
Action that removes the handler from the event source.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.EventSubscriptionTracker.Track``1(System.Action{System.EventHandler{``0}},System.Action{System.EventHandler{``0}},System.EventHandler{``0})
member.summary: Registers a typed event subscription using EventHandler<T> pattern.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.EventSubscriptionTracker.Track``1(System.Action{System.Action{``0}},System.Action{System.Action{``0}},System.Action{``0})
member.summary: Registers a typed event subscription using Action delegate pattern (e.g., Action<LogEntry>).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.EventSubscriptionTracker.TrackAction(System.Action{System.Action},System.Action{System.Action},System.Action)
member.summary: Registers a parameterless event (Action) subscription.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.EventSubscriptionTracker.Dispose
member.summary: Detaches all tracked subscriptions and marks the tracker as disposed. Safe to call multiple times.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.EventSubscriptionTracker.TrackedCount
member.summary: Gets the number of currently tracked subscriptions.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.NavigationSnapshot
member.summary: Immutable snapshot of navigation state taken before a navigation transaction begins. Used to restore navigation stacks if the transaction is rolled back.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.NavigationTransactionScope
member.summary: Represents a navigation transaction scope. Provides commit/rollback semantics around a navigation operation. Acquired from NavigationService via BeginTransaction().

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.NavigationTransactionScope.Commit
member.summary: Marks the transaction as committed — no rollback will occur on Dispose.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.NavigationTransactionScope.Rollback
member.summary: Explicitly rolls back navigation state to the snapshot taken at transaction start.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.NavigationTransactionScope.Dispose
member.summary: On dispose — if not committed, automatically rolls back.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.DispatchPriority
member.summary: Priority levels for dispatcher queue slots.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.DispatchPriority.Critical
member.summary: High-importance UI operations (navigation, modal dialogs).

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.DispatchPriority.Normal
member.summary: Standard ViewModel property updates.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.DispatchPriority.Low
member.summary: Background diagnostics, log streaming.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.PriorityDispatcherQueue
member.summary: Weighted Round-Robin priority dispatcher queue. Weights: Critical 50%, Normal 35%, Low 15%. Includes per-level aging boost and a hard 1000ms flush for starved slots.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.PriorityDispatcherQueue.Enqueue(System.Action,FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.DispatchPriority)
member.summary: Enqueues an action into the specified priority lane. Drops oldest entry when cap is exceeded.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.PriorityDispatcherQueue.DrainViaWeightedRoundRobin
member.summary: Drains queued work items onto the UI dispatcher using WRR scheduling.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.PriorityDispatcherQueue.PendingCount(FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.DispatchPriority)
member.summary: Gets the current pending count for the given priority lane.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SafeDispatcher
member.summary: Thread-safe dispatcher wrapper that prevents re-entrant deadlocks and ensures all UI operations execute correctly regardless of calling thread context.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SafeDispatcher.AppDispatcher
member.summary: Gets the WPF application dispatcher, falling back safely if not yet initialized.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SafeDispatcher.IsOnUIThread
member.summary: Returns true if the current thread is the UI dispatcher thread.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SafeDispatcher.Invoke(System.Action,System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority)
member.summary: Invokes on the UI thread synchronously. If already on the UI thread, executes inline (safe from deadlock).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SafeDispatcher.BeginInvoke(System.Action,System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority)
member.summary: Posts to the UI thread asynchronously (fire-and-forget safe).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SafeDispatcher.InvokeAsync(System.Action,System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Awaitable version — posts to UI thread and returns a Task.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SafeDispatcher.InvokeAsync``1(System.Func{``0},System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Awaitable version — posts to UI thread and returns Task<T>.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SafeDispatcher.SafeBeginInvoke(System.Action,System.Windows.Threading.DispatcherPriority)
member.summary: Runs on UI thread ensuring it will not throw if app is shutting down.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SnapshotCoordinator
M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SnapshotCoordinator.EnterFreezeAsync(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Acquires the global freeze barrier exclusively. All subsystems must check before mutating shared state. Times out after 10 seconds to prevent deadlocks.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SnapshotCoordinator.IsFrozen
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the system is currently in a snapshot freeze. Subsystems should poll this flag and defer mutations during freeze.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.SnapshotCoordinator.Dispose
member.summary: Releases the freeze barrier and resumes normal subsystem operation.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.QueueOverflowPolicy
member.summary: Policy applied when the UI update queue is at capacity.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.QueueOverflowPolicy.DropOldest
member.summary: Remove the oldest pending update before enqueuing the new one.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.QueueOverflowPolicy.DropNewest
member.summary: Discard the incoming update if queue is full.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.QueueOverflowPolicy.Coalesce
member.summary: Replace the last pending item with the incoming update (merge/coalesce).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.UIUpdateQueue`1
member.summary: Bounded, thread-safe UI update queue for ViewModel property update batching. Max size: 500 items. Configurable overflow policy.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.UIUpdateQueue`1.Count
member.summary: Gets the current number of pending items in the queue.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.UIUpdateQueue`1.Enqueue(`0)
member.summary: Enqueues an update, applying the configured overflow policy if at capacity.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.UIUpdateQueue`1.DrainAll
member.summary: Drains all pending items and returns them as a snapshot list.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.UIUpdateQueue`1.TryDequeue(`0@)
member.summary: Attempts to dequeue the oldest pending item.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.UIUpdateQueue`1.Clear
member.summary: Clears all pending updates.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.ViewModelLeakDetector
member.summary: Tracks ViewModel instances via weak references and counts how many are still alive (i.e., not yet GC-collected). Used in diagnostics HUD to detect memory leaks. Only active in DEBUG builds to avoid overhead in production.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.ViewModelLeakDetector.Register(FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase)
member.summary: Registers a ViewModel for leak tracking.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.ViewModelLeakDetector.StaticRegister(FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase)
member.summary: Static registration entry-point — called from ViewModelBase constructor without requiring a resolver instance.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.ViewModelLeakDetector.RegisteredCount
member.summary: Gets the total count of ViewModels ever registered since startup.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.ViewModelLeakDetector.EstimatedLiveCount
member.summary: Gets an approximate count of ViewModels still in memory (not GC'd). NOTE: Due to GC non-determinism this is approximate.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.ViewModelLeakDetector.OnFinalized
member.summary: Records a ViewModel finalization (triggered by GC).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Infrastructure.ViewModelLeakDetector.Reset
member.summary: Resets counters — use only in test teardown scenarios.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore
member.summary:
Thread-safe, double-buffered Singleton implementation of IApplicationStateStore.
Features: - All mutations are lock-protected with double-buffer swap. - Freeze barrier (SnapshotCoordinator.IsFrozen) is respected: mutations are queued and applied after the freeze lifts. - Settings are serialized to disk atomically (temp-file swap) on every change. - Restore validates values before applying.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore.TakeSnapshot
member.summary: Takes an immutable snapshot of the current state. Respects the SnapshotCoordinator freeze barrier.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore.RestoreSnapshot(FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateData)
member.summary: Restores state from a previously taken snapshot. Validates all values before applying.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore.PersistCurrentStateAsync
member.summary: Persists current state to disk atomically (write-to-temp then rename).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateStore.LoadPersistedStateAsync
member.summary: Loads and restores persisted state from disk on startup.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateData
member.summary: Serializable state data bag — value type semantics via explicit Clone().

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.DialogService
member.summary: Implementation of IDialogService that leverages TaskCompletionSource to allow async await dialog flows.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore
member.summary: Interface representing the central thread-safe application state container. Supports snapshot/restore, freeze-barrier awareness, and atomic persistence.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore.CurrentCompanyId
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently active Company ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore.CurrentPayrollRunId
member.summary: Gets or sets the active Payroll Run ID.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore.SelectedFinancialYear
member.summary: Gets or sets the selected Financial Year.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore.SelectedEmployeeId
member.summary: Gets or sets the currently selected Employee ID.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore.Clear
member.summary: Clears the entire application state to default values.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore.TakeSnapshot
member.summary: Takes an immutable snapshot of the current application state. Thread-safe; respects the SnapshotCoordinator freeze barrier.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore.RestoreSnapshot(FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ApplicationStateData)
member.summary: Restores application state from a previously taken snapshot. Validates snapshot before applying.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore.PersistCurrentStateAsync
member.summary: Persists the current state to disk atomically.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore.LoadPersistedStateAsync
member.summary: Loads and applies the last persisted state from disk. Should be called during application startup.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IDialogService
member.summary: Service coordinating overlay messages and confirmation dialogs in WPF.

member.name: E:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IDialogService.MessageRequested
member.summary: Event fired when a basic message box dialog is requested.

member.name: E:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IDialogService.ConfirmationRequested
member.summary: Event fired when a confirmation (Yes/No) dialog is requested.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IDialogService.ShowMessageAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shows an alert dialog and awaits the user closing it.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IDialogService.ShowConfirmationAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shows a confirmation dialog and awaits the user's choice.
member.returns: True if user confirmed, false otherwise.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILoadingService
member.summary: Service contract for displaying global busy loading indicator screens.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILoadingService.IsLoading
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether loading is in progress.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILoadingService.Message
member.summary: Gets the optional message description to show on the busy loader screen.

member.name: E:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILoadingService.LoadingStateChanged
member.summary: Event fired when loading state changes.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILoadingService.Show(System.String)
member.summary: Shows the global loading overlay with an optional status message.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILoadingService.Hide
member.summary: Hides the global loading overlay.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.LogEntry
member.summary: Model representing a captured diagnostic log entry in the system.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.LogEntry.#ctor(System.DateTime,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.LogLevel,System.String,System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Model representing a captured diagnostic log entry in the system.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILogBuffer
member.summary: Service coordinating the in-memory log buffer for real-time diagnostics.

member.name: E:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILogBuffer.LogAdded
member.summary: Event raised when a new log entry is appended to the buffer.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILogBuffer.Write(FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.LogEntry)
member.summary: Appends a new log entry to the buffer.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILogBuffer.GetLogs
member.summary: Retrieves a snapshot of all currently stored log entries.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILogBuffer.Clear
member.summary: Clears all log entries from the buffer.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService
member.summary: Service contract for WPF shell view model navigation with history and breadcrumbs.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.CurrentView
member.summary: Gets the currently active view model.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.CanGoBack
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether back navigation is possible.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.CanGoForward
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether forward navigation is possible.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.DerivedBreadcrumbPath
member.summary: Gets the derived breadcrumb trail based on the current view model.

member.name: E:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.CurrentViewChanged
member.summary: Event raised when the current view model navigation target changes.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.NavigateTo``1
member.summary: Navigates to the specified view model type by resolving it from DI.
member.typeparam: The type of view model to navigate to.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.NavigateTo(System.Type,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Navigates to the specified view model type, optionally preserving history stacks.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.GoBack
member.summary: Navigates back in history.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.GoForward
member.summary: Navigates forward in history.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService.RestoreLastState
member.summary: Restores the last active view model state from saved configurations.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.InMemoryLoggerProvider
member.summary: Logger provider creating instances of InMemoryLogger to write diagnostics to the shared ILogBuffer.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.InMemoryLogger
member.summary: Custom ILogger writing diagnostic messages directly into the ring-buffer.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.NotificationType
member.summary: Type of toast notification to show.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.NotificationMessage
member.summary: Model representing an active notification toast message.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INotificationService
member.summary: Service coordinating popups, alerts, and toasts inside the WPF desktop application window.

member.name: E:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INotificationService.NotificationRaised
member.summary: Event fired when a new notification is requested to be displayed.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INotificationService.Show(System.String,System.String,FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.NotificationType)
member.summary: Dispatches a notification to be displayed to the user.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INotificationService.Success(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Dispatches a success notification.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INotificationService.Error(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Dispatches an error notification.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INotificationService.Warning(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Dispatches a warning notification.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INotificationService.Info(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Dispatches an info notification.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.LoadingService
member.summary: Service managing the loading overlay status.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.LogBuffer
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory ring-buffer logging sink capped at 10,000 entries.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.MemorySmoothingScheduler
member.summary:
Schedules incremental GC cleanup and deferred LOH compaction.
Design: - Runs incremental Gen0+Gen1 cleanup every 2 minutes during idle periods. - LOH compaction (GCSettings.LargeObjectHeapCompactionMode) is ONLY triggered: a) During guaranteed application-idle periods (no UI activity for 30s), AND b) When working set exceeds the configured pressure threshold (300MB default). - A 500ms dispatcher-idle check gates all operations to ensure zero UI stutter.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.MemorySmoothingScheduler.Start
member.summary: Starts the background memory management loop.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.MemorySmoothingScheduler.NotifyActivity
member.summary: Call this from the WPF shell on any user interaction (mouse move, keypress) to reset the idle clock and prevent premature LOH compaction.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.NavigationService
member.summary: Thread-safe, transactional navigation service. - All navigation requests are serialized through a SemaphoreSlim lock. - Consecutive duplicate navigations are suppressed. - Navigation state is persisted asynchronously. - Outgoing ViewModels are disposed on transition if they implement IDisposable. - Full commit/rollback transaction semantics via NavigationTransactionScope.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.NotificationService
member.summary: Service coordinating the raising of notification toast events to UI overlays.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor
member.summary: UI health watchdog that: - Pings the WPF Dispatcher at 1Hz using a background thread - Measures response latency with a moving 30-sample average - Uses linear regression trend prediction to detect slow degradation early - Carries a recovery exclusion lock to prevent collision with active navigation transactions - Triggers self-healing (garbage collect + warn) at configurable thresholds

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor.Start
member.summary: Starts the watchdog background loop.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor.LastLatencyMs
member.summary: Gets the last measured UI dispatcher latency in milliseconds.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor.AverageLatencyMs
member.summary: Gets the moving average latency across the last 30 samples.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemHealthMonitor.ComputeLatencySlope
member.summary: Linear regression on latency samples to predict deterioration trend. Returns slope in ms per sample.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemIntegrityValidator
member.summary: Hourly system integrity auditor. Checks navigation stack bounds, ViewModel leak counts, memory headroom, and queue health. Logs warnings on any detected anomaly.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.SystemIntegrityValidator.Start
member.summary: Starts the hourly audit background loop.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.WpfCurrentUserService
member.summary: Implementation of ICurrentUserService and ICurrentUserAccessor for WPF application. Provides current user details and permissions to satisfy command orchestration and audit layers.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.WpfTenantProvider
member.summary: WPF implementation of ITenantProvider. Resolves active tenant context dynamically from the shared in-memory ApplicationStateStore session parameters.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.WpfTenantProvider.#ctor(FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IApplicationStateStore)
member.summary: Initializes the tenant provider with the session state store.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.AdminViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel managing role permission views, audit logs, and general settings.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.AdminViewModel.Title
member.summary: Gets the panel title.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase
member.summary: Base view model providing: - INotifyPropertyChanged via ObservableObject (CommunityToolkit.Mvvm) - 30Hz throttled bounded UI update dispatcher - EventSubscriptionTracker for safe handler detachment - ViewModelLeakDetector registration (DEBUG only) - Strict IDisposable lifecycle with finalizer fallback

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase.PropertyUpdateQueue
member.summary: Bounded UI update queue (500 items, DropOldest policy). Subclasses enqueue string property names here; the throttle timer drains them.

member.name: F:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase.Subscriptions
member.summary: Tracks all event subscriptions. Call .Track(...) instead of manually subscribing to events.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase.IsBusy
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the view model is performing a background operation.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase.ScheduleUpdate(System.String)
member.summary: Schedules a property change notification via the 30 Hz throttle timer. Safe to call from any thread.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all managed resources.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Override in subclass to release additional resources. Always call base.Dispose(disposing).

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.Base.ViewModelBase.Finalize
member.summary: Finalizer fallback — logs if subclass forgot to call Dispose.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.DashboardViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the executive dashboard panel containing KPI widgets and status summaries.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.DashboardViewModel.Title
member.summary: Gets the panel screen title.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.EmployeeViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the employee registry management panel.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.EmployeeViewModel.Title
member.summary: Gets the panel title.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.LogViewerViewModel
member.summary:
Diagnostics Log Viewer ViewModel.
Features: - 15ms batching timer slices all incoming log entries before updating the ObservableCollection. - Hard cap of 1000 visible rows (oldest trimmed first). - Diagnostics HUD properties: live ViewModel count, subscriptions estimate, and memory metrics. - Full IDisposable lifecycle with EventSubscriptionTracker.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.LogViewerViewModel.FilteredLogs
member.summary: Filtered visible log entries — updated via 15ms batch timer.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.LogViewerViewModel.LiveViewModelCount
member.summary: Estimated number of live (not GC'd) ViewModels.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.LogViewerViewModel.WorkingSetMb
member.summary: Current process working set in megabytes.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.LogViewerViewModel.RefreshLogs
member.summary: Reloads the full filtered log list from the ring buffer.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.MainViewModel
member.summary: Principal View Model coordinating layout panels, global loaders, toast signals, and navigation bounds.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.MainViewModel.#ctor(FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INavigationService,FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.ILoadingService,FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.INotificationService,FijiPayroll.WPF.Services.IDialogService)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether global loading overlay screen is active.

member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the user can navigate forward in history.

member.summary: Gets the derived breadcrumb path for display.

member.summary: Gets the active theme name.

member.summary: ViewModel managing polymorphic reference data lookups (Departments, Banks, positions, etc.).

member.summary: Gets the list of available categories.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.PayrollComponentViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel for the read-only Payroll Component listing screen. Follows MVVM using CommunityToolkit.Mvvm and consumes directly.

member.summary: Gets the list of payroll component summaries.

member.summary: Gets the next page command.

member.summary: Gets the previous page command.

member.summary: Gets the delete component command.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.WPF.ViewModels.PayrollRunViewModel
member.summary: ViewModel managing the Payroll Run operations and lifecycle. Executes long-running computations asynchronously in the background.

member.summary: List of payroll runs retrieved.

member.summary: Container ViewModel for the payroll processing operations, hosting the detailed run manager view model.
